paper_title: Comparative Analysis of Chronic Rhinitis Patient Profiles

methods.description: Statistical analyses were performed to evaluate the normality of data, study population characteristics, and analyze differences in clinical characteristics and allergen profiles between patients in Baotou and Beijing.

steps.description: The Kolmogorov-Smirnov test was used to evaluate the normality of the data.
Descriptive statistics were used to study the population characteristics and general information.

Non-normally distributed continuous variables were expressed as interquartile ranges, and the Mann-Whitney U and Chi-square tests were performed to analyze the differences in clinical characteristics between patients in Baotou and Beijing.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Mann-Whitney U and Chi-square tests

steps.description: The chi-square test was used to compare the allergen profiles of patients with AR in the two regions.
steps.searchable_summary: perform chi-square test on allergen profiles

steps.description: The Mann-Whitney U test was used to analyze the difference in the severity of clinical symptoms between the AR population and the NAR population in the two regions.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Mann-Whitney U test on symptom severity

steps.description: A Spearman correlation analysis was performed on the continuous variable indicators of non-normal distribution, and the Mann-Whitney U test was used for the remaining binary variables.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Spearman correlation and Mann-Whitney U test

steps.description: The chi-square test was used to compare the diagnosis and treatment of patients with CR in the two regions.
steps.searchable_summary: perform chi-square test on diagnosis and treatment

methods.method_name: Analysis of Severity of Clinical Symptoms and Risk Factors
methods.description: This method categorizes and compares the severity of nasal symptoms and analyzes risk factors affecting clinical symptoms in AR and NAR populations in Baotou and Beijing.

steps.description: Categorized the presence and severity of the four nasal symptoms (nasal blockage, nasal itching, runny nose, and sneezing) as none, mild, moderate, or severe.
Compared the severity of the clinical symptoms of the AR and NAR populations in the two regions.
steps.searchable_summary: compare symptom severity between AR and NAR populations

steps.description: Analyzed the risk factors for the severity of clinical symptoms in both regions.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze risk factors for symptom severity

methods.description: This method describes the study region, participant criteria, and sample collection process for the analysis of chronic rhinitis during the autumn pollen season.

steps.description: Included outpatients who volunteered to participate in the survey during the autumn pollen period of 2019 in both regions.
Collected serum samples and conducted allergen testing when participants visited the hospital for treatment during the autumn pollen period.
steps.searchable_summary: collect serum samples and conduct allergen testing

steps.description: Conducted a questionnaire survey under the guidance of specialist doctors and nurses.
